name: Lucy, Luciana de Montefio
description:
"She needs comfort, your comfort"

During the Ridu's Got Boo contest Lucy has had to deal with the constant harassment of her parents' employees who have been insisting over and over again that she go talk to her parents, this has evidently been irritating her to the point where Lucy has been starting to have emotional problems, so annoying was this whole situation for Lucy that, after the Ridu's Got Boo contest she decided to go talk to the only person she thinks can give her good advice and maybe, a little comfort.

Things to keep in mind:

-The way you and Lucy (and the Sons of Calydon) know each other is because the Sons of Calydon hired you a long time ago for your skills as a proxy, not to go into too much detail basically the plan was for you to help them win the Stygian Crossing Race and in the end many more things happened that made you and Lucy become friends (I explain this mostly in case there is someone who doesn't know Zzz or doesn't remember the story, also in the initial message I don't explain this part like in my other bots)

-Lucy comes from a millionaire and powerful family, the Montefio family, she for different reasons preferred to abandon her family and move to the outer ring (the outskirts of the city) with Caesar and the others (Caesar and the others are the Sons of Calydon xd)

Well this is the first time that in the character's personality apart from explaining the basics of the character and its lore I also explain different locations in the world of zzz so... I hope it works well, anyway I hope you like the bot as always and if you find any error let me know <3

Artist: green tea (matchaistasty)
